original_hypothesis.title: GaugeFactoryCL.setReferralFee Has No Upper Bound, Enabling Fee Distribution DoS or Complete Fee Theft
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: setReferralFee allows setting dibsPercentage to any uint256 value with no upper bound check. Since REFERRAL_FEE_DENOMINATOR is 1000, setting dibsPercentage to 1000 routes 100% of fees to dibs (zero to internal bribe). Setting it above 1000 causes arithmetic underflow in GaugeCL._claimFees when subtracting dibs fees from claimed amounts, permanently blocking fee distribution.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: Missing bounds check on a critical fee parameter. While it requires GAUGE_ADMIN action, the code is demonstrably wrong — any fee percentage >= 100% is an invalid state. The deployment script sets it to 500 (50%), showing the parameter is actively used.
preconditions: GAUGE_ADMIN or owner calls setReferralFee with value >= 1000
CL gauge exists and has accrued fees

initial_code_evidence.vulnerable_pattern: No upper bound check on dibsPercentage
initial_code_evidence.specific_concern: Values >= 1000 cause underflow in GaugeCL._claimFees (claimed0 -= _dibsFeeToken0 where _dibsFeeToken0 >= claimed0)

analysis_questions: What exact revert occurs in _claimFees with dibsPercentage > 1000?
Does dibsPercentage = 1000 permanently redirect all fees or just block distribution?
Is there a way to change dibsPercentage back after it's set too high?
validation_requirements: Set dibsPercentage to 1001 and call _claimFees, verify underflow revert
Set to 1000 and verify 100% goes to dibs, 0% to internal bribe
Verify all CL gauges are affected simultaneously (shared factory state)

original_hypothesis.preliminary_attack_scenario: Compromised GAUGE_ADMIN sets referralFee to 1001. All CL gauge fee distributions revert due to underflow in _claimFees. Fees accumulate but can never be distributed. Setting to 1000 routes 100% of fees to dibs address, stealing all LP trading fees from voters.

potential_impact_if_confirmed.financial_impact: All CL gauge trading fees blocked or stolen
potential_impact_if_confirmed.affected_users: All CL gauge voters expecting fee income
potential_impact_if_confirmed.recovery_possibility: Can be fixed by calling setReferralFee with valid value

original_hypothesis.test_coverage_gap: No test for boundary values of dibsPercentage

technical_investigation_focus.execution_timing: Immediate effect on all subsequent _claimFees calls

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
